message: Hi team, let's have a mood check send an emoji to describe your mood
I'll go first, :thumbsup:
:thumbsup:
I'm excited about showing off all your hard work at todays stakeholder meeting
:skull: knackered, had a few too many late nights this week
:rainbow:
living the dream :smile:
:smirk: im excited to see the show too
shouldn't you be prepping for the meeting
:sweat_smile: i am indeed I'll leave you lot to it
hang in there @daniel its gonne be the weekend sooner or later :joy:
I should get on with my prep too have a good day team
@shay strict diet of energy drink for me today lol
hope the presentation goes well @tinus
:raised_hands:

Welcome to Rumours, remember communication is key to diagnose the problem.

 *Use `/help` at any time for a list of useful links and commands*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin Start button
Clicked Start button
:alarm_clock: - You have 20 minutes to resolve the outage, good luck! You can type `/help` if you need any reminders.
Hey team, I'm texting from the board room - kinda embarrassing but in my demo to the board, I tried to add a pair of Aviator sunglasses to the shopping cart and I got a ?http 500?
I've bought some time but need this be able to do this demo if we can lets get this sorted in the next 20 minutes.
Metrics
uh oh, those Aviators are top sellers due to the new Top Gun movie...It's size up the issue time Karl Smith
Come on this can't be happening!
I'm in this meeting so, wont be able to help but I trust that you all can get this fixed asap, just @ me if you need anything
ok looking into this now
Im not able to reproduce this issue at the moment
IS anyone else able to?
No nor me, checked out aviators with no problem
:star: Attempt to replicate the issue
I can't replicate either
Tinus is the issue still occurring for you?
Yes, it's only throwing the error for the aviators
Just trying to buy time at the moment so I won't be the most responsive
Same issue from another device?
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
I can try. Currently got my laptop hooked up for the presentation so it will be difficult
Everything else is the same - same account, same device
What about in another browser?
:star: Reproduces the incident
Is this affecting customers?
I'm using Chrome like usual
Bob is there any customer impact?
Never had this issue before
Daniel is there any errors logged when Tinus reproduces the issue?
Haven't received any reports so far, will continue monitoring
:star: Facts over opinion
Let me investigate
There were a few changes recently, could any of those be responsible?
Hey guys, Tinus has reported he's facing an issue in a shareholder presentation. Is this an on-going incident?
Daniel anything ?
No not seeing any errors
However I notice that his product number differs from mine
It should be #OLJCESPC7Z, his error message shows #OLJCESPC7D
\incident Reports of 500 internal error when adding some items to the shopping basket sev3
Reports of 500 internal error when adding some items to the shopping basket sev3
*Incident Number INC100033:* Reports of 500 internal error when adding some items to the shopping basket sev3
:star: Incident record created
:star: Send first comms in first 5 minutes
:star: Formally assign criticality level to the incident
Daniel Shay could this be fall out from the recent changes?
:star: Reviewed changes
The only service I suspect could be responsible is product catalogue
But no changes were made to that recently
So is this affecting any customers?
Daniel Lets revert the change please to see if that resolve the issue
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
There weren't any recent changes to product catalogue
Only payments, adservice and checkout service
Update: Engineers are investing. No customer reports received so far
Although our changes will affect all users at once, this just seems to be affecting @Tinus
Anything you want me to try team? I've been able to move it but still, it's not a good look in front of the board
Daniel Was the change to production or test?
Those changes were to production
Is Tinus use the production site?
Why would Tinus' product number be different to ours?
Yes I'm using the production site
Tinus if you clear browser cache does that resolve the issue?
I'll give it a go
Damn! thats it
Great Ive got to do my presentation now, thanks for figuring this out so quickly. @daniel @shay can you look in to a cache busting solution?
it was the cache! sure we can do that
no worries boss, at least its not a significat issue
good luck with the presentation!
yes good luck @tinus
good luck @tinus!

Thank you for playing, We recommend that you take 5 minutes to go and get a drink or stretch your legs.
Once you are back we ask that you complete this retrospective and feedback form, just hit I am ready when you want to start. I am ready button
Update Issue was a localized problem. Resolved after clearing local browser cache
